heading: Configure an Endpoint Service
body:
By default, Amazon Bedrock connects to your knowledge base over
the public internet. To further secure your connection, MongoDB Vector Search
supports connecting to your knowledge base over a virtual
network through an [AWS PrivateLink](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/privatelink/what-is-privatelink)
[endpoint service](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/privatelink/create-endpoint-service).

Optionally, complete the following steps to enable an endpoint service
that connects to an AWS PrivateLink private endpoint for your Atlas cluster:
